'''Arno''', also known as '''Old Arno''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] settler on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. Arno was one of the "[[oldster]]s", [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] who travelled aboard the ''[[Dowager Queen/Legends|Dowager Queen]]'' and settled on Tatooine after it crashed. Arno was on good terms with [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] since Tallon settled on Tatooine.<ref name="TM" />

Soon after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jodo Kast]] traveled to Tatooine tracking Tallon because of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]]. Kast threatened Arno, but Arno managed to escape from him. [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]], a criminal associate of Kast, contacted with a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] who were also looking for Tallon to rescue him from the bounty hunters. Kardue'sai'Malloc told them that Arno, "an old local who knows where Tallon lives," wanted to meet them at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]. This was false: Kast wanted the Rebels to enter the cantina where he and Kardue'sai'Malloc were; Kardue'sai'Malloc would identify them and then Kast and his associates would ambush them. However, the Rebels survived the ambush. The Rebels would eventually meet with Arno, and Arno guided them to [[Fort Tusken/Legends|Tallon's home]].<ref name="TM" />
